name: Medallions of Veal with Sauces III (Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a sauté pan, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Add shallot puree and let the mixture cook for about 1 minute.
3. Deglaze with white wine.
4. Add all of the chopped mushrooms, garlic puree, and veal stock. Reduce for about 2 minutes until liquid evaporates.
5. Add salt, coarse-ground black pepper, and chopped chives.
6. Remove the contents from the pan into a bowl.
7. Deglaze the sauté pan with 1/4 cup white wine and add the contents of the deglazed pan to the stuffing in the bowl.
8. Add foie gras to the rest of the stuffing and set aside.
